blended.narrative: Red Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,836 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
